title: Review blockers, followups, and verification criteria
summary: Reviewed IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md blockers, followups, and verification criteria against AGENTS.md and actual code. Found 10 findings: 3 critical (Proposal frontend uses Server Actions not manifest routes; PO frontend is procurement/ not inventory/; PO routes use raw SQL not manifest), 2 blocker accuracy issues (generator contradiction in #1, command-level constraint gap in #2), and 5 moderate/low items. Output: task-4-findings.md.
